vocab.sentence: Tom is angry because he lost his pencil.
vocab.sentence_chinese: Tom 因為遺失鉛筆而生氣。

vocab.sentence: I am thirsty. I want some juice.
Are you happy today? Yes, I am.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 你今天快樂嗎？是的，我是。

vocab.sentence: She is hungry. She wants a hot dog.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 她肚子餓了。她想要一個熱狗。

vocab.sentence: Is he sad? Yes, he is.
I am sick today. I can't go to school.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 我今天生病了。我不能去學校。

vocab.sentence: She is tired. She wants to sleep.

phrases.sentence: Watch out! A car is coming.
Are you OK? No, I'm not. I'm sick.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 你還好嗎？不，我不好。我生病了。

tips.label: Are you + 形容詞？
tips.text: 詢問「你是否...」用 Are you + 形容詞？肯定回答 Yes, I am.，否定回答 No, I'm not.

tips.label: Is he/she + 形容詞？
tips.text: 詢問「他/她是否...」用 Is he/she + 形容詞？肯定回答 Yes, he/she is.，否定回答 No, he/she isn't.

notes.title: Are you + 形容詞？（詢問你的狀態）
notes.description: 用 Are you 開頭詢問對方的狀態或感覺。回答時用 Yes, I am. 或 No, I'm not.
examples: Are you happy? Yes, I am.
Are you sad? No, I'm not.
Are you tired? Yes, I am.
Are you angry? No, I'm not.

notes.title: Is he/she + 形容詞？（詢問他人的狀態）
notes.description: 用 Is he/she 開頭詢問第三者的狀態。回答時用 Yes, he/she is. 或 No, he/she isn't.
examples: Is he sad? Yes, he is.
Is she happy? No, she isn't.
Is he sick? Yes, he is.
Is she tired? No, she isn't.

quiz.question: ___ you happy? Yes, I am.
quiz.hint: 詢問 you 的狀態用 Are you。

quiz.question: Are you sad? ___, I am.
quiz.hint: 肯定回答用 Yes, I am.

quiz.question: Is he ___? Yes, he is. He can't go to school.
quiz.hint: 不能上學通常是生病（sick）。

quiz.question: Are you tired? No, I'm ___.
quiz.hint: No, I'm not. 中 not 放在 I'm 後面。

quiz.question: Is ___ sad? No, she isn't.
quiz.hint: Is 搭配 he 或 she（第三人稱單數）。

quiz.question: Which word means 口渴的？
quiz.hint: thirsty = 口渴的。

quiz.question: Are you angry? Yes, ___ am.
quiz.hint: 回答 Are you...? 時用 I am.

quiz.question: Is she happy? No, she ___.
quiz.hint: 否定回答 No, she isn't.

quiz.question: 「他難過嗎？」用英文怎麼說？
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數用 Is he + 形容詞？

quiz.question: Is he tired? Yes, ___ is.
quiz.hint: 問 Is he...? 回答用 he is.

quiz.question: Are you hungry? ___, I'm not.
quiz.hint: 否定回答用 No, I'm not.

quiz.question: Which word means 生氣的？
quiz.hint: angry = 生氣的。

quiz.question: Is she ___? Yes, she is. She can't go to school.
quiz.hint: 不能上學是因為生病（sick）。

quiz.question: Are you happy? No, I'm ___.
quiz.hint: No, I'm not. 用 not。

quiz.question: ___ he angry? No, he isn't.
quiz.hint: 詢問第三人稱 he 用 Is。

quiz.question: Which word means 疲倦的？
quiz.hint: tired = 疲倦的。

quiz.question: Is she sad? ___, she is.
quiz.hint: 肯定回答用 Yes, she is.

quiz.question: Are you thirsty? ___, I'm not.
quiz.hint: 否定回答用 No, I'm not.

quiz.question: Is he happy? No, ___ isn't.
quiz.hint: 問 Is he...? 否定回答用 he isn't.

quiz.question: Which word means 飢餓的？
quiz.hint: hungry = 飢餓的。

quiz.question: ___ you sick? Yes, I am.
quiz.hint: 詢問 you 的狀態用 Are you。

quiz.question: Is he tired? Yes, he ___.
quiz.hint: 肯定回答 Yes, he is.

quiz.question: 「你生氣嗎？」的正確英文是？
quiz.hint: Are you + 形容詞？

quiz.question: Are you happy? No, ___ not.
quiz.hint: No, I'm not. 主詞是 I。

quiz.question: Which word means 難過的？
quiz.hint: sad = 難過的。

quiz.question: Is ___ tired? Yes, she is.
quiz.hint: 回答是 she is，所以主詞是 she。

quiz.question: Are you hungry? Yes, ___ am.
quiz.hint: 回答 Are you? 用 Yes, I am.

quiz.question: Which word means 生病的？
quiz.hint: sick = 生病的。

quiz.question: Is he sad? No, he ___.
quiz.hint: 否定回答 No, he isn't.

quiz.question: Are you thirsty? Yes, ___ am.
quiz.hint: 回答 Are you? 用 I am.

quiz.question: Is she angry? ___, she isn't.
quiz.hint: 否定回答用 No, she isn't.

quiz.question: Which word means 快樂的？
quiz.hint: happy = 快樂的。

quiz.question: Is he happy? No, he ___.
quiz.hint: 否定回答 No, he isn't.

quiz.question: Are you tired? ___, I am.
quiz.hint: 肯定回答用 Yes, I am.

quiz.question: 「她不難過。」正確的回答方式是？
quiz.hint: 否定：No, she isn't.

quiz.question: ___ she sick? Yes, she is.
quiz.hint: 詢問 she 的狀態用 Is。

quiz.question: Are you angry? No, ___ not.
quiz.hint: No, I'm not. 主詞是 I。

quiz.question: Is he hungry? Yes, ___ is.
quiz.hint: 問 Is he? 肯定回答用 he is.

quiz.question: Are you OK? No, I'm ___. I'm sick.
quiz.hint: No, I'm not. 用 not 表示否定。

quiz.question: Is she tired? No, ___ isn't.
quiz.hint: 問 Is she? 否定回答用 she isn't.

quiz.question: 「你飢餓嗎？是的，我是。」用英文？
options: A. Are you hungry? Yes, I am.
B. Is you hungry? Yes, I am.
C. Are you hungry? Yes, she is.
D. Is he hungry? Yes, he is.
quiz.hint: Are you hungry? Yes, I am.

quiz.question: Are you sad? No, I'm ___.
quiz.hint: No, I'm not. 用 not。

quiz.question: Is he ___? Yes, he is. He can't find his book.
quiz.hint: 找不到東西會生氣（angry）。

quiz.question: Which sentence is correct?
quiz.hint: Are + you；Is + he/she。

quiz.question: ___ she happy? No, she isn't.
quiz.hint: 詢問 she 的狀態用 Is。

quiz.question: Are you sick? Yes, ___ am.
quiz.hint: 回答 Are you? 用 I am.

quiz.question: Is he angry? No, ___ isn't.
quiz.hint: 問 Is he? 否定回答用 he isn't.

quiz.question: 「她口渴嗎？不，她不是。」用英文？
options: A. Is she thirsty? Yes, she is.
B. Are she thirsty? No, she isn't.
C. Is she thirsty? No, she is.
D. Is she thirsty? No, she isn't.
quiz.hint: Is she thirsty? No, she isn't.

quiz.question: Is she tired? ___, she is.
quiz.hint: 肯定回答用 Yes, she is.

quiz.question: Are you happy? Yes, ___ am.
quiz.hint: 回答 Are you? 用 I am.
